name: Merchant Marine Capital Construction Fund (CCF) Deposits

eligibility.description: Owners or lessees of 'agreement vessels' (including certain barges and containers) operating in U.S. foreign/domestic commerce or fisheries who enter into a specific agreement with the Secretary of Transportation or Commerce.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can reduce their taxable income by depositing earnings from the operation of agreement vessels into a Capital Construction Fund. These deposits, along with earnings on the fund assets, are excluded from gross income.
